name: Boursin Mashed Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 lb All purpose potatoes, peeled and cut into 2 inch chunks
2 packages Imported French Boursin cheese with garlic and herbs
1/2 cup Whole milk or half & half
Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the peeled and cut potatoes in a large pot. Cover with water.
Bring to a boil, then cook for 20-25 minutes until the potatoes are
tender and cooked through. Drain the potatoes using a colander.
Return them to the pot and heat over low heat for 30 seconds to
evaporate any remaining water.
2. Using a hand-held mixer, mash the potatoes until smooth. Add the
two packages of Boursin cheese and continue beating until thoroughly
incorporated. Thinly mix in the milk or half & half, beating for an
additional minute.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Transfer the mashed potatoes to an oven-safe casserole dish.
Reheat by baking at 350°F or microwaving until piping hot. Serve
immediately.
